ford_c_max_job_note_66ba278889.text: Keyless start family. The Ford master workbook identifies the pear-style 433 MHz Hitag Pro key and OEM reference 2027592; backup slot is normally around the steering-column shroud area.

ford_c_max_job_note_6cd474bf98.text: The Ford master workbook confirms 433 MHz and OEM reference 2027592 for the 2015-2019 Hitag Pro family.

ford_c_max_job_note_676bcf7eb7.text: The Ford master workbook covers the full 2003-2010 first-generation family with HU101, 433 MHz and the ID63 40-bit family. Confirm exact remote shell against the original key.

ford_c_max_job_note_6b78d5cf72.text: Use only where push-button start is confirmed. Exact smart-key OEM number varies by build; 1713499 is a common matching Ford oval smart-key reference in this family.

ford_c_max_job_note_0a2587560f.text: Uses the standard Focus Mk3/C-Max DST80 programming family. The Ford master workbook records OEM references 1756409 and 2026900.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
